title: Review of bail orders
doc_html:
Art. 831.  Review of bail orders

A child refused bail, or as a remedy for excessive bail, may invoke the supervisory jurisdiction of the court of appeal.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §8, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
